title: Address Resolution Protocol (ARP)
overview: Address Resolution Protocol (ARP) plays a vital role in IPv4 networking by enabling devices on the same local subnet to discover the MAC address associated with a given IP address. This mapping is essential for enabling Layer 3 (IP) communication over Layer 2 (Ethernet) networks.
